name: AI Stress Tested
description: AI systems are periodically stress-tested to evaluate performance under extreme market conditions.
rationale: ESMA ¶21: firms should conduct periodic stress tests to evaluate how these AI systems perform under extreme market conditions.
source: ESMA Public Statement ESMA35-335435667-5924 — On the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the provision of retail investment services (30 May 2024), mapping AI use onto MiFID II obligations.
